/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -g -D_DEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/Texture.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libTexture.bep -o libTexture.bep CMakeFiles/Texture.dir/Texture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Texture.dir/lodepng.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Texture.dir/TextureWin32.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/runner/work/UABE/UABE/build/UABE_Generic:/home/runner/work/UABE/UABE/build/AssetsTools:/home/runner/work/UABE/UABE/build/CrnlibWrap:/home/runner/work/UABE/UABE/build:/home/runner/work/UABE/UABE/build/ModInstaller ../../UABE_Generic/libUABE_Generic.so -lUABE_Win32 ../../AssetsTools/libAssetsTools.so ../../libStringConverter/liblibStringConverter.a -Wl,-rpath-link,/home/runner/work/UABE/UABE/build/CrnlibWrap:/home/runner/work/UABE/UABE/build:/home/runner/work/UABE/UABE/build/ModInstaller
